mapper.select: SELECT T.SAVE_TIME AS saveTime, T.AGNT_NM AS agntNm, T.MTRL_CD AS mtrlCd, T.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNm, T.LOC_CD AS locCd, T.STOCK_QTY AS stockQty, T.PALT_TYPE AS paltType, A.AGNT_CD AS agntCd, L.LOC_ID AS locId, L.LOC_NM AS locNm, /* [추가] 상품 마스터에서 실제 상품명을 가져와 매칭 여부 확인 */ M.MTRL_NM AS mtrlNmCheck, CASE WHEN M.MTRL_CD IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS mtrlYn, T.REMARK AS remark, T.STATUS AS status FROM TBL_STOCK_TEMP T WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M A ON T.AGNT_NM = A.AGNT_NM AND T.CMPY_CD = A.CMPY_CD LEFT JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L ON T.LOC_CD = L.LOC_CD AND T.CMPY_CD = L.CMPY_CD /* [추가] 상품 코드와 회사 코드로 상품 마스터 조인 */ LEFT JOIN TBL_MTRL_M M ON T.MTRL_CD = M.MTRL_CD AND T.CMPY_CD = M.CMPY_CD WHERE T.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND T.WH_CD = #{whCd} AND T.STOCK_QTY > 0 ORDER BY T.TEMP_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_WH_LOC_M ( CMPY_CD, WH_CD, LOC_CD, LOC_NM, ZONE_ID, USE_YN, SAVE_USER, SAVE_TIME, DELETED_YN ) SELECT DISTINCT T.CMPY_CD, T.WH_CD, T.LOC_CD, T.LOC_CD AS LOC_NM, -- 초기 명칭은 코드로 설정 (SELECT TOP 1 ZONE_ID FROM TBL_WH_ZONE_M WHERE CMPY_CD = T.CMPY_CD AND WH_CD = T.WH_CD AND ZONE_CD = 'STORAGE') AS ZONE_ID, 'Y', #{saveUser}, GETDATE(), 'N' FROM TBL_STOCK_TEMP T WHERE T.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND T.WH_CD = #{whCd} AND T.LOC_CD IS NOT NULL AND T.LOC_CD <> '' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M L WHERE L.CMPY_CD = T.CMPY_CD AND L.WH_CD = T.WH_CD AND L.LOC_CD = T.LOC_CD )

INSERT INTO [dbo].[TBL_WH_LOC_M] ( CMPY_CD, WH_CD, ZONE_ID, LOC_CD, LOC_NM, LOC_TYPE, ALLOW_MIX_YN, LOCK_YN, USE_YN, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, DELETED_YN, PICKING_YN ) SELECT A.CMPY_CD, #{whCd} AS WH_CD, 5 AS ZONE_ID, -- 평치 존 ID (필요시 시스템의 실제 평치 ZONE_ID로 확인 필요) 'FLOOR_' + A.AGNT_CD AS LOC_CD, N'평치_' + A.AGNT_NM AS LOC_NM, 'FLOOR' AS LOC_TYPE, 'Y' AS ALLOW_MIX_YN, 'N' AS LOCK_YN, 'Y' AS USE_YN, GETDATE() AS SAVE_TIME, #{saveUser} AS SAVE_USER, 'N' AS DELETED_YN, 'Y' AS PICKING_YN FROM ( /* [변경 포인트] 주문 이력이 아닌, 현재 재고가 1개라도 있는 고객사 추출 */ SELECT DISTINCT S.CMPY_CD, AM.AGNT_CD, AM.AGNT_NM FROM TBL_STOCK_TEMP S WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M AM WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CMPY_CD = AM.CMPY_CD AND S.AGNT_NM = AM.AGNT_NM WHERE S.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND S.WH_CD = #{whCd} AND S.STOCK_QTY > 0 -- 실제 재고가 남아있는 고객만 대상 AND AM.USE_YN = 'Y' ) A WHERE NOT EXISTS ( /* 이미 해당 고객의 평치 로케이션이 존재하는지 체크 */ SELECT 1 FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M L WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE L.CMPY_CD = A.CMPY_CD AND L.WH_CD = #{whCd} AND L.LOC_CD = 'FLOOR_' + A.AGNT_CD )

INSERT INTO TBL_STOCK_HISTORY ( BACKUP_DT, BACKUP_SEQ, STOCK_ID, CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, ZONE_ID, LOC_ID, STOCK_QTY, ALLOCATED_QTY, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, LOT_NO, WH_CD, EXPIRE_DATE, PLT_SPEC, BACKUP_TIME ) SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112), -- BACKUP_DT (YYYYMMDD) (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(BACKUP_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_STOCK_HISTORY WHERE BACKUP_DT = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112)), -- 회차 계산 STOCK_ID, CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, ZONE_ID, LOC_ID, STOCK_QTY, ALLOCATED_QTY, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, LOT_NO, WH_CD, EXPIRE_DATE, PLT_SPEC, GETDATE() -- BACKUP_TIME (현재 시간) FROM TBL_STOCK WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND WH_CD = #{whCd}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_STOCK WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND WH_CD = #{whCd}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_STOCK ( CMPY_CD, WH_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, ZONE_ID, LOC_ID, STOCK_QTY, ALLOCATED_QTY, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER ) SELECT DATA.CMPY_CD, DATA.WH_CD, DATA.AGNT_CD, DATA.MTRL_CD, DATA.ZONE_ID, DATA.LOC_ID, SUM(CAST(DATA.STOCK_QTY AS DECIMAL(18,2))) AS STOCK_QTY, 0 AS ALLOCATED_QTY, GETDATE(), #{saveUser} FROM ( SELECT T.CMPY_CD, T.WH_CD, A.AGNT_CD, T.MTRL_CD, /* 1. 실제 로케이션의 ZONE_ID 우선 사용 2. 로케이션이 없으면 해당 화주의 'FLOOR_' 로케이션의 ZONE_ID 조회 3. 그것도 없으면 ZONE_CD가 'FLOOR'인 데이터의 ZONE_ID를 최종적으로 가져옴 */ ISNULL(L.ZONE_ID, ISNULL( (SELECT TOP 1 ZONE_ID FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE CMPY_CD = T.CMPY_CD AND WH_CD = T.WH_CD AND LOC_CD = 'FLOOR_' + A.AGNT_CD), (SELECT TOP 1 ZONE_ID FROM TBL_WH_ZONE_M WHERE CMPY_CD = T.CMPY_CD AND WH_CD = T.WH_CD AND ZONE_CD = 'FLOOR') ) ) AS ZONE_ID,
/* 로케이션 ID 결정 (없으면 FLOOR_화주코드 로케이션) */ ISNULL(L.LOC_ID, (SELECT TOP 1 LOC_ID FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE CMPY_CD = T.CMPY_CD AND WH_CD = T.WH_CD AND LOC_CD = 'FLOOR_' + A.AGNT_CD) ) AS LOC_ID, T.STOCK_QTY FROM TBL_STOCK_TEMP T INNER JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M A ON T.AGNT_NM = A.AGNT_NM AND T.CMPY_CD = A.CMPY_CD LEFT JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L ON T.LOC_CD = L.LOC_CD AND T.CMPY_CD = L.CMPY_CD AND T.WH_CD = L.WH_CD WHERE T.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND T.WH_CD = #{whCd} ) DATA WHERE DATA.LOC_ID IS NOT NULL /* 최종적으로 LOC_ID가 확인된 건만 삽입 */ GROUP BY DATA.CMPY_CD, DATA.WH_CD, DATA.AGNT_CD, DATA.MTRL_CD, DATA.ZONE_ID, DATA.LOC_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE T SET T.REMARK = '반영완료' FROM TBL_STOCK_TEMP T INNER JOIN TBL_AGENCY_M A ON T.AGNT_NM = A.AGNT_NM AND T.CMPY_CD = A.CMPY_CD INNER JOIN TBL_STOCK S ON S.CMPY_CD = T.CMPY_CD AND S.WH_CD = T.WH_CD AND S.AGNT_CD = A.AGNT_CD AND S.MTRL_CD = T.MTRL_CD /* 로케이션 매핑: 직접 매핑되었거나 평치로 매핑된 건 모두 포함 */ AND S.LOC_ID = ISNULL( (SELECT LOC_ID FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE CMPY_CD = T.CMPY_CD AND WH_CD = T.WH_CD AND LOC_CD = T.LOC_CD), (SELECT TOP 1 LOC_ID FROM TBL_WH_LOC_M WHERE CMPY_CD = T.CMPY_CD AND WH_CD = T.WH_CD AND LOC_CD = 'FLOOR_' + A.AGNT_CD) ) WHERE T.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND T.WH_CD = #{whCd}

UPDATE MM SET /* ST.total_qty가 없으면 0으로 업데이트 */ MM.CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(ST.total_qty, 0), MM.YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY = ISNULL(ST.total_qty, 0), MM.UPDT_USER = #{saveUser}, MM.UPDT_TIME = GETDATE() FROM TBL_MTRL_M MM LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD, SUM(ISNULL(STOCK_QTY, 0)) as total_qty FROM TBL_STOCK WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND WH_CD = #{whCd} GROUP BY CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, MTRL_CD ) ST ON MM.CMPY_CD = ST.CMPY_CD AND MM.AGNT_CD = ST.AGNT_CD AND MM.MTRL_CD = ST.MTRL_CD WHERE MM.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}
